meaning: n.脊骨,书脊,地面隆起地带,中心,剌
examples: The disease had deformed his spine.
A bone in my spine was out of alignment.
Mr Mooney's rooftop is full of these white towers, where seeds are planted up along each tower's spine.
Tayloni Mazyck suffered a severed spine following the 8:30 p.m. shooting outside her home in Bedford-Stuyvesant.
